def negative_shared_mutable_collection_mutated_across_threads_without_lock():
    rule_id = "shared_mutable_collection_mutated_across_threads_without_lock"
    family = "architecture"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Shared mutable collection such as a list or dict is mutated from multiple threads without a lock."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
